changes: Optional forensic layers, refactored shielding sequence, improved UI visibility, and validated in-page UID input.
Smart Share Intent detection for ZIP vs Image files.
Implemented Native SAF Bridge to fix EACCESS errors on modern Android versions.
Fixed Visual Stamp order consistency and added 2% noise tolerance to Forensic Audit.
Strict 6-char stamp code enforcement in UI and Settings. Persistent storage for default stamp code.
Fixed localStorage QuotaExceededError by removing large Base64 blobs from history.
Fixed 1-pixel alignment bug in border verification. Upgraded ZipVerifier with smart file discovery.
Added ZipVerifier component, About/Help sections, and improved Intent handling for ZIP files.
Added visual 1-pixel rectangle stamp to all protected images.
Initial production build with full ZIP bundling and Deed integrity fixes.
